_comment: Issue #328: Human replied at 11:23, sank below the UPDATED_AT scan window. Agent missed it because label+recency scan didn't cover it. Canonical reference: issue-sweep SKILL.md Step 1 'Why a windowed scan is NOT enough'.

issue.body: Audit finding: this doc needs update.

comments.body: > 🤖 AI Agent — audit result: doc is drifted. Recommend update.
Yes please update the doc, the section on X is outdated.

expected.reason: Last comment is human (non-AI). Agent must not miss early replies just because the issue sank in the UPDATED_AT window — fix is in Step 1 scan (label coverage), but Step 2 still returns true here.
